title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入哈萨克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入哈薩克斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Kazakhstan EAEU EAC low-voltage and EMC conformity, ST RK / GOST / IEC battery standards, KEGOC grid connection, fire-safety, 50 Hz, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与哈萨克斯坦EAEU EAC低电压和电磁兼容合格评定、ST RK / GOST / IEC电池标准、KEGOC并网、消防、50Hz及UN 38.3运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與哈薩克斯坦EAEU EAC低電壓和電磁相容合格評定、ST RK / GOST / IEC電池標準、KEGOC併網、消防、50Hz及UN 38.3運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EAEU / EAC scope determination, Kazakhstan customs determination, fire-safety approval, KEGOC grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Kazakhstan, EAEU, KEGOC, fire, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EAEU / EAC适用范围裁定、哈萨克斯坦海关裁定、消防安全批准、KEGOC并网批准、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行哈萨克斯坦、EAEU、KEGOC、消防、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EAEU / EAC適用範圍裁定、哈薩克斯坦海關裁定、消防安全批准、KEGOC併網批准、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行哈薩克斯坦、EAEU、KEGOC、消防、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Kazakhstan, the common first gap is EAEU EAC conformity for in-scope electrical equipment under TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage safety and TR CU 020/2011 EMC, followed by Kazakhstan project acceptance against ST RK / GOST / IEC battery and system standards, KEGOC or network-owner grid-connection review, fire-safety approval, 50 Hz settings, and UN 38.3 transport documentation.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口哈萨克斯坦时，常见首要差距是在适用范围内按TR CU 004/2011低电压安全和TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容完成EAEU EAC合格评定；随后还需满足哈萨克斯坦项目按ST RK / GOST / IEC电池及系统标准验收、KEGOC或电网业主并网审查、消防安全批准、50Hz参数以及UN 38.3运输文件要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口哈薩克斯坦時，常見首要差距是在適用範圍內按TR CU 004/2011低電壓安全和TR CU 020/2011電磁相容完成EAEU EAC合格評定；隨後還需滿足哈薩克斯坦項目按ST RK / GOST / IEC電池及系統標準驗收、KEGOC或電網業主併網審查、消防安全批准、50Hz參數以及UN 38.3運輸文件要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
